implementation_summary.summary: CP00-723 extends the RP24 Korean Legal Depth korean-legal descriptor from RP24.P01.M02.S09 through RP24.P01.M04.S06 across 40 planned Type And Shape Definition, Primary Implementation Slice, and Secondary Workflow Slice units while preserving CP00-722 as historical foundation evidence and keeping HWPX, Korean clause, litigation, court filing, corporate document, permission, audit, Hermes runtime, and product-state surfaces closed.

commit_policy.commit_message: Close CP00-723 Korean Legal Depth domain workflow slice pack

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-723 RP24.P01.M02.S09-RP24.P01.M04.S06 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
